name: the-silk-roads
description: Peter Frankopan's The Silk Roads — world history toolkit recentering the global narrative on Central Asia and the trade routes that connected East and West for two millennia
useCase: Understand the Silk Road as the axis of world history, trace empires and cultural exchange, critique Eurocentrism, and connect past to present geopolitics
knownRisks: One-volume coverage of 2,000 years necessitates simplification — specialists may find gaps
Frankopan's revisionist thesis can be as one-sided as the Eurocentrism he critiques
The modern geopolitical analysis (Belt and Road) may date quickly as events evolve
